title: Verify Analytics Events for Engagement Actions
description: Test that key user engagement events within the Trial Corner hub are triggered with the correct attributes.
preconditions: User is in an active trial and viewing the Trial Corner hub.

steps.description: 1. Scroll to the 'Trending' section, triggering a `trial-corner-trending-viewed` event.
2. Click on the first content item in the 'Trending' section.
3. Verify a `trial-corner-trending-clicked` event is fired with the correct 'content id'.
4. Scroll up to the 'Engagement' section where a trailer auto-plays.
5. Verify a `trial-corner-topcontent-played` event is fired with the correct 'content id' and 'autoplay' attribute.

expected_result: All specified analytics events are correctly triggered in the data layer/analytics backend with their respective attributes as the user interacts with the page.
